welcome: Select a command to inspect my work.

commands.label: Identity
commands.description: A quick snapshot of how I approach product and engineering.
output: Product-minded builder focused on beautiful, usable interfaces.
I like fast feedback loops, clean architecture, and strong UX details.
Currently based in Zurich and collaborating remotely across Europe.

commands.label: Core Stack
commands.description: Tools and practices I use to ship consistently.
output: Frontend: React, Next.js, Vite, modern CSS architecture.
Backend: Node.js, API integration, auth and data modeling.
Workflow: CI/CD, code review discipline, iterative delivery.

commands.label: Current Focus
commands.description: What I care about most in current projects.
output: Building conversion-focused web experiences with expressive motion.
Upgrading design systems for speed, consistency, and accessibility.
Mentoring teams on architecture choices that stay maintainable.

commands.label: Availability
commands.description: Best way to start a conversation.
output: Open to product engineering, frontend, and creative dev work.
Happy to discuss freelance projects, startup builds, or full-time roles.
